summary: Iteration 19 - All new features tested and working. Backend APIs return new fields (social_spotify, show_spotify, terms_content, privacy_content, sender_emails, content_sections on programs, icon/style on stats). Frontend: Terms (/terms) and Privacy (/privacy) pages render correctly, Footer has gold icons for email/phone, Footer program links navigate to /program/:id correctly, Admin Header & Footer tab has 4 sub-tabs (Social Media, Footer Content, Terms & Privacy, Sender Emails) all functional, Admin Programs tab shows Content Sections editor with Add Section button, Admin Stats tab shows icon field and Font Styling controls.
critical_code_review_comments: ProgramDetailPage.jsx: Correctly renders content_sections from API, with fallback to program description when no sections
Footer.jsx: Gold icons (text-[#D4AF37]) applied to Mail and Phone icons, program links use navigate('/program/${p.id}'), Terms/Privacy links present
HeaderFooterTab.jsx: 4 sub-tabs implemented (social, footer, legal, emails) with correct toggle and input fields
AdminPanel.jsx: Content Sections editor in program form with add/remove/reorder/font-styling functionality
models.py: ContentSection model with title_style, subtitle_style, body_style dicts for font customization
Stats.py: Stat model includes icon field and value_style/label_style for font customization
site_settings.py: All new social fields (spotify, pinterest, tiktok, twitter, apple_music, soundcloud) and legal fields (terms_content, privacy_content, sender_emails)
seed_data_creation: Test content added via backend tests: terms_content, privacy_content, sender_emails, content_section on first program
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Dynamic content sections on program detail pages, 2) Footer with gold icons and program navigation, 3) Terms/Privacy pages, 4) Admin HeaderFooter tab with 4 sub-sections for social media/footer/legal/emails, 5) Admin Stats with icon and font styling. Phone OTP is MOCKED.

backend_api.GET /api/settings - social fields: PASS - Returns social_spotify, show_spotify, social_pinterest, etc.
backend_api.GET /api/programs - content_sections: PASS - Returns content_sections array on programs
backend_api.GET /api/stats - icon/style: PASS - Returns icon, value_style, label_style fields
backend_api.PUT /api/settings: PASS - Can update terms_content, privacy_content, social toggles, sender_emails
backend_api.PUT /api/programs/{id}: PASS - Can update content_sections on program
backend_api.POST /api/stats: PASS - Can create stat with icon and style fields

frontend_pages./terms: PASS - Terms page renders with title and content from settings
frontend_pages./privacy: PASS - Privacy page renders with title and content from settings
frontend_pages./program/:id: PASS - Program detail page renders with dynamic content sections or fallback

footer.gold_email_icon: PASS - Mail icon has text-[#D4AF37] class
footer.gold_phone_icon: PASS - Phone icon has text-[#D4AF37] class
footer.program_links: PASS - 6 program links present, navigate to /program/:id correctly
footer.terms_link: PASS - Terms & Conditions link present with data-testid
footer.privacy_link: PASS - Privacy Policy link present with data-testid

admin_header_footer_tab.social_media_subtab: PASS - Shows all 10 social platforms with toggles (FB, IG, YT, LinkedIn, Spotify, Pinterest, TikTok, Twitter/X, Apple Music, SoundCloud)
admin_header_footer_tab.terms_privacy_subtab: PASS - Shows textarea editors for terms_content and privacy_content
admin_header_footer_tab.sender_emails_subtab: PASS - Shows sender email configuration with add/remove

admin_programs_tab.content_sections_editor: PASS - Shows 'Page Content Sections' heading with Add Section button
admin_programs_tab.section_editor_fields: PASS - Title, Subtitle, Body, Image URL, enabled toggle, order controls, font styling

admin_stats_tab.icon_field: PASS - Input for FontAwesome icon class
admin_stats_tab.font_styling: PASS - Expandable section with Value Style and Label Style controls (color, size, bold, italic, font)
